content: hi i saw your post, how much is the pearl necklace and do you ship internationally?

So the **Layered Pearl Necklace** is $92 and comes in 16" or 18", it's freshwater pearls on an 18k gold-filled chain and it's in stock! 🤍

And yes we do ship internationally! It's $24.99 via USPS Priority (7-14 business days), but since the necklace is over $75, **you actually get free international shipping!** Just a heads up that customs/import fees may apply depending on your country.

Lmk which length you'd want and I can sort out a payment link for you! 😊
do you have anything for a wedding gift for a friend which is under 80$ i want something gold and cute

Ok so here are some really cute options under $80 that would make amazing wedding gifts! 🥂

💛 **Gold Bar Pendant Necklace** - $65, can even be custom engraved which is SO cute for a wedding gift
💛 **Pearl Drop Earrings** - $55, literally made for weddings, super elegant
💛 **Gold Chain Bracelet** - $42, trendy paperclip chain she could stack with other pieces

All three are under $75 so standard shipping would apply, but if you grabbed two of them you'd hit the free shipping threshold! Do any of these feel like her vibe? Happy to help you pick the best one 😊
